old_wizard.default.speaker: Old Wizard
old_wizard.default.text: Hocus Pocus! I am an adjacent Wizard.

old_wizard.quest_start.speaker: Old Wizard
old_wizard.quest_start.text: Ah, traveler! A fierce Kobold has occupied the Eastern Ruins.

old_wizard.quest_start.speaker: Old Wizard
old_wizard.quest_start.text: It is extremely agile and matches your stats. Could you defeat it and bring back its remains?

old_wizard.quest_active.speaker: Old Wizard
old_wizard.quest_active.text: Have you defeated the Kobold yet? Be careful, its agility is equal to yours!

old_wizard.quest_active_ready.speaker: Old Wizard
old_wizard.quest_active_ready.text: Marvelous! You have vanquished the Kobold. Here is your reward!

old_wizard.quest_completed.speaker: Old Wizard
old_wizard.quest_completed.text: Thank you again, brave traveler. The ruins are safer now.
